why_this_song: 1999 by Prince (1982) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 29 times; first heard in: "Two-thousand-zero-zero party over"

Appears 9 times; first heard in: "So tonight I'm gonna party like it's 1999"
Appears 8 times; first heard in: "Oops out of time"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: So tonight I'm gonna party like it's 1999
(I was dreaming' when I wrote this)
(So sue me if I go too fast)
If you didn't come to party
Don't bother knockin' on my door

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "party" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "party" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "zero" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "zero" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Don't worry, I won't hurt you
And baby he's ready to roar

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: I only want you to have some fun
I'd rather dance my life away (1999)

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "1999" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "1999" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "1999" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "1999" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "1999" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "1999"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
